Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ApexTestRunResult

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ApexTestRunResult
public class ApexTestRunResult extends SObject

Java class for ApexTestRunResult complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ApexTestRunResult">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AsyncApexJob" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AsyncApexJob" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AsyncApexJobId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClassesCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClassesEnqueued" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAllTests" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JobName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MethodsCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MethodsEnqueued" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MethodsFailed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Source" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TestTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
